title: Install or uninstall AI assistant skills for Graphify

action.description: Whether to install or uninstall agent skills.

agent.description: Run `graphify <action> --project --platform <a>|<b>|...` for one or more AI coding assistants. Can be repeated (--agent=claude --agent=cursor). Required for `uninstall`; if omitted for `install`, runs `graphify install --project` with no --platform flag.
